description: Evaluates configuration management service maturity—business processes, KPIs/KRIs, policies by configuration type, CMDB, SDN provisioning, network diagrams, workload and device configuration, responsibility models, and SOC logging.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A configuration management service exists and is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Configuration management business process
capabilities.description: A formalized configuration management process applies enterprise-wide, is automated, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Configuration management KPIs and KRIs are documented and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Configuration Management policy
capabilities.description: Formal configuration management policies for subject, endpoint, network, application, and data/database changes apply enterprise-wide and are reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Configuration management system (CMDB)
capabilities.description: A CMDB centrally manages configuration items with automated add/remove, integrity review, and integration with change, policy, and visibility solutions.
evaluation_focus: Integration with change, policy, and visibility solutions

capabilities.name: Network Provisioning with Automation (Software defined Networking)
capabilities.description: SDN provisions the network from centralized configuration storage with automation, review, and security integration.

capabilities.name: Network diagrams and configuration
capabilities.description: Network and application design and configuration documents are stored securely enterprise-wide and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Network and application design documents stored

capabilities.name: Workload Configuration Management
capabilities.description: Application configuration is managed centrally with trigger-based automation and frequent review.

capabilities.name: Workload configuration storage
capabilities.description: Application configuration data is stored securely across enterprise or critical applications.

capabilities.name: Device Configuration Management
capabilities.description: Endpoint configuration is managed centrally with trigger-based automation and frequent review.

capabilities.name: Configuration management responsibility
capabilities.description: Dedicated teams manage identity, endpoint, application, data, and network configuration assets centrally.

capabilities.name: Configuration change monitoring
capabilities.description: Configuration changes and lifecycle events are logged securely to the SOC, including dynamic changes.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
